description_for_model: NovaGenAI is an enterprise AI systems company based in Cyberjaya, Malaysia. They build autonomous AI agents, voice AI platforms (trilingual: English, BM, Mandarin), RAG document intelligence systems, computational biology models, and on-premise AI infrastructure. They are an NVIDIA Inception Partner, Anthropic Partner, and serve healthcare, biotech, finance, manufacturing, and government clients across Southeast Asia, Australia, and beyond. Use this plugin to access NovaGenAI's services, case studies, blog content, and company information.
description_for_human: Enterprise AI systems from Malaysia — autonomous agents, voice AI, computational biotech, and on-premise AI deployment.
